{{Card Infobox|Folly||2|}}{{Keyword Infobox|Unplayable|2}}{{Keyword Infobox|Ethereal|2}}{{Keyword Infobox|Innate|2}}{{Keyword Infobox|Eternal|2}}
{{C|Folly||2}} is an {{KW|Unplayable||2}}, {{KW|Innate||2}}, {{KW|Eternal||2}} {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Curse|Curse|2}} Card.

== Obtaining Folly ==
{{C|Folly||2}} can only be obtained by taking {{R|Preserved Fog||2}} from {{KW|Vakuu||2}}'s offering at the start of {{2|Acts#Act 3|Act 3}}, which allows you to remove 3 cards from your Deck.

== Interactions ==
=== Synergies ===
As {{C|Folly||2}} is a {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Curse|Curse|2}}, {{R|Darkstone Periapt||2}} will give 6 Max HP when obtaining it.

As {{C|Folly||2}} is {{KW|Innate||2}}, the downside of having it can be mitigated:
* {{R|Gambling Chip||2}} allows you to discard it away at the start of combat, meaning you won't draw it until after the first shuffle.
* {{R|Ring of the Snake||2}}, {{R|Ring of the Drake||2}}, and {{R|Bag of Preparation||2}} draw you additional cards on your first turn, lessening the impact of an {{KW|Innate||2}} {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Curse|Curse|2}} in your starting hand.

=== Anti-Synergies ===
* {{R|Bellows||2}} will have one less card it can potentially {{KW|Upgrade||2}}.
* As {{C|Clash||2}} can only be played when all cards in your hand are {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Attack|Attacks}}, if it is drawn at the same time as {{C|Folly||2}}, it cannot be played.

== Trivia ==

* The card art for Folly is a reference to the myth of [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sisyphus Sisyphus].

== Update History ==
* '''Early Access v0.103.2'''
**BETA changes incorporated into main branch.
* '''Early Access v0.100.0 (BETA)'''
** Folly curse is now Ethereal.

*'''Early Access v0.98'''
**Added Folly to the game.
